summary: Iteration 109 (108b+108c): Public Booking Page Brand Integration + Settings Brand Tab testing complete. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend features fully functional - booking page shows branded header with studio name/initials, step dots indicator, warm background (#F9F7FE). Settings Brand tab has all required components: logo upload, color pickers, font picker, BrandPreview, PortfolioSettings, SharePortfolio.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 109 tested Public Booking Page brand integration (108b) and Settings Brand Tab (108c). Public booking page at /book/:userId shows warm background (#F9F7FE), branded header with studio name and initials/logo, 4-step dots indicator with glow effect on active step. Settings page has 5 tabs (Profile, Brand, Notifications, Integrations, Account). Brand tab contains: Brand identity section (logo upload, primary/accent color pickers with hex inputs, 5 font options rendered in their own font), Live preview section (BrandPreview with Portfolio/Quotes/Portal tabs), Portfolio section (PortfolioSettings with Add Work button, SharePortfolio with portfolio link and QR code). PATCH /api/settings accepts brandPrimaryColor, brandAccentColor, brandFontFamily, brandLogoUrl. Default brand colors are #6C2EDB (primary) and #E8891A (accent).

backend: GET /api/settings returns brand fields (brandPrimaryColor, brandAccentColor, brandFontFamily, brandLogoUrl)
PATCH /api/settings accepts multiple brand fields at once
GET /api/book/:userId returns user brand info (brandPrimaryColor, brandAccentColor, brandLogoUrl, studioName, timezone)
frontend: Public booking page at /book/:userId loads with warm background (#F9F7FE - rgb(249, 247, 254))
Booking page branded header shows studio name (KOLOR STUDIO)
Booking page branded header shows brand initials (K) in purple circle when no logo
Step dots indicator shows 4 dots with glow effect on active step
Meeting type selection step displayed (shows 'No meeting types available' when none configured)
Settings page has 5 tabs: Profile, Brand, Notifications, Integrations, Account
Brand tab shows Brand identity section with logo upload button
Brand tab shows primary color picker (#6C2EDB) with hex input
Brand tab shows accent color picker (#E8891A) with hex input
Brand tab shows font picker with 5 options (Inter, Fraunces, Playfair Display, Montserrat, Libre Baskerville)
Font options are rendered in their own font family
Brand tab shows Save brand button
Brand tab shows Live preview section with BrandPreview component
BrandPreview has tabs for Portfolio, Quotes, Portal previews
Brand tab shows Portfolio section with PortfolioSettings component
PortfolioSettings has Add Work button and empty state
Brand tab shows SharePortfolio component with portfolio link and QR code
